team.name: Sahis — Founder
team.bio: With over a decade of experience in holistic wellness, Sahis founded Saiba with a simple mission: a place where everyone belongs and every visit feels like coming home.

team.name: Team Member
team.bio: Specializing in advanced facials and skin analysis, bringing a meticulous, science-backed approach to every skin concern.

team.name: Team Member
team.bio: A master colorist trained in balayage and precision cuts, known for listening carefully and delivering transformations that feel truly personal.
